# Daily Scrum Template

Copy this to `daily-scrum/YYYY-MM-DD.md` in the current sprint directory.

|--------|-------|-------------|
| `abc1234` | US-XXX | feat(US-XXX): implemented feature |
| `def5678` | US-YYY | fix(US-YYY): fixed edge case |
